messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: Express, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text "hello world" colors, through a frontend ui
Clarifications:
- framework: Express
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: Express, Styling: Tailwind CSS\n\nOriginal request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text \"hello world\" colors, through a frontend ui\nClarifications:\n- framework: Express\n- styling: Tailwind CSS\nPrevious validation issues:\nNone",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "init-node-express-project",
      "title": "Initialize Node.js and Express project",
      "description": "Create a new project folder, run npm init -y, install express and nodemon, and add start/dev scripts in package.json.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "npm run dev starts an Express server responding on http://localhost:3000."
    },
    {
      "id": "configure-tailwind-css",
      "title": "Set up Tailwind CSS build pipeline",
      "description": "Install tailwindcss, postcss, and autoprefixer; initialize tailwind.config.js and postcss.config.js; create src/input.css with Tailwind directives; add build script to output public/styles.css.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-node-express-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Running npm run build:css produces public/styles.css containing Tailwind utilities without errors."
    },
    {
      "id": "scaffold-express-app",
      "title": "Scaffold Express app structure and static serving",
      "description": "Create server.js, configure Express to serve static files from a public directory, and add a root route serving public/index.html.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "init-node-express-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Navigating to http://localhost:3000 serves index.html and static assets from /public."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-backend-color-api",
      "title": "Implement in-memory color API endpoints",
      "description": "Add GET /api/color to return the current color and POST /api/color to update it; validate hex or rgb format and store in a module-level variable.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "scaffold-express-app"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "GET /api/color returns { color: \"#xxxxxx\" } and POST /api/color updates it with 200 status and rejects invalid input."
    },
    {
      "id": "build-frontend-ui",
      "title": "Build index.html with Hello World and color controls",
      "description": "Create index.html styled with Tailwind showing a \"Hello World\" element plus a color input and preset color buttons; include public/app.js and link public/styles.css.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "scaffold-express-app",
        "configure-tailwind-css"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "The page displays the text and visible color controls styled by Tailwind when loaded."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-frontend-logic",
      "title": "Implement client-side logic to change and persist color",
      "description": "In public/app.js, handle color picker and preset button events to update the text color immediately and call the API to save; fetch initial color on load and apply it.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "build-frontend-ui",
        "implement-backend-color-api"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Changing the control updates the text color instantly and persists across page reloads while the server runs."
    },
    {
      "id": "dev-build-and-run",
      "title": "Build assets and run development server",
      "description": "Run Tailwind in watch mode and start the Express server (via concurrently or separate terminals), then verify the UI works without console errors.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "configure-tailwind-css",
        "scaffold-express-app",
        "implement-frontend-logic"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Local dev server serves the app; color changes through the UI work and CSS loads correctly."
    },
    {
      "id": "document-usage-and-next-steps",
      "title": "Document setup, scripts, and usage",
      "description": "Create a README with install steps, scripts to build CSS and run the server, and instructions for changing the \"Hello World\" color; include notes for future enhancements.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "dev-build-and-run"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README instructions allow a new developer to run the app and change the text color successfully."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 8,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Incremental build: initialize project, configure CSS tooling, scaffold server and static hosting, add minimal API, create UI, wire client logic to API, validate end-to-end in dev, then document."
}
